definitions.name: Renovation queue: Garden
definitions.description: Planning flag — mark purchased when work begins. Adjust cost/days in catalog edit if needed.

definitions.name: Renovation queue: Vault
definitions.description: Planning flag — mark purchased when work begins. Adjust cost/days in catalog edit if needed.

definitions.name: Renovation queue: Cobbled Street
definitions.description: Planning flag — mark purchased when work begins. Adjust cost/days in catalog edit if needed.

definitions.name: Renovation queue: Stage
definitions.description: Planning flag — mark purchased when work begins. Adjust cost/days in catalog edit if needed.

definitions.name: Renovation queue: Snug
definitions.description: Planning flag — mark purchased when work begins. Adjust cost/days in catalog edit if needed.

definitions.name: [Manor] City Permits and Guild Licenses
definitions.description: 250 gp upfront, 1 day. Enables repairs/improvements; legal compliance.

definitions.name: [Manor] Gutting, Cleaning, Structural and Cosmetic Repairs
definitions.description: 1,000 gp, 12 days. Enables further improvements; minimal furnishings baseline; long rest HP +1 until next LR.

definitions.name: [Manor] Guild Contract Fees
definitions.description: 5 gp/tenday. Enables improvements; legal compliance during renovations/business.

definitions.name: [Manor] City Services and Regular Maintenance
definitions.description: 5 gp/tenday. Water/sewer; guilds prevent disrepair.

definitions.name: [Manor] Membership — Fellowship of Innkeepers
definitions.description: 2 gp/tenday if operating as tavern/inn; party covered.

definitions.name: [Manor] Additional Guild Memberships (each)
definitions.description: 2 gp/tenday per additional guild (brewers, musicians, magists, smiths, etc.).

definitions.name: [Manor] Basic Manor Staff
definitions.description: 15 gp/tenday, 3 days. Prereq: Furnishings Basic, Kitchen Cheap. THP = half level on LR.

definitions.name: [Manor] Manor Service Staff
definitions.description: 30 gp/tenday, 5 days. Prereq: Basic Staff, Furnishings Comfortable, Kitchen Mod, Larder Cheap. THP = level on LR; servants' quarters.

definitions.name: [Manor] Manor Noble Staff
definitions.description: 50 gp/tenday, 10 days. Prereq: Service Staff, Furnishings Lavish, Barracks, Shrine or Library, Cobbled Streets, Kitchen Quality, Larder Mod, Cellar Mod. Noble benefits.

definitions.name: [Manor] Manor Furnishings — Minimal
definitions.description: 20 gp, 5 days. HP bonus tier 0 on LR (see doc).

definitions.name: [Manor] Manor Furnishings — Basic
definitions.description: 200 gp, 5 days. HP bonus tier +3 on LR.

definitions.name: [Manor] Manor Furnishings — Comfortable
definitions.description: 400 gp, 5 days. HP bonus tier +9 on LR.

definitions.name: [Manor] Manor Furnishings — Lavish
definitions.description: 1,200 gp, 5 days. HP bonus tier +27 on LR.

definitions.name: [Manor] Vault — Basic
definitions.description: 400 gp, 10 days. DC 18 lock; 50 cu ft; traps per DMG; door not magic.

definitions.name: [Manor] Vault — Moderate
definitions.description: 900 gp, 10 days. DC 23; 500 cu ft.

definitions.name: [Manor] Vault — Complex
definitions.description: 1,800 gp, 10 days. DC 30; 5,000 cu ft; 1 deadly trap option; magic passphrase option.

definitions.name: [Manor] Security Enhancements
definitions.description: 200 gp, 2 days. Heavy cover vs outside assault; harder doors/windows.

definitions.name: [Manor] Magical Security System (minimum)
definitions.description: 500+ gp, 5+ days. Prereq: Security Enhancements. Alarm 1st dusk–dawn; scalable per doc.

definitions.name: [Manor] Barracks
definitions.description: 100 gp + 30 gp/tenday, 4 days. Prereq: Basic Staff, Security. 4 guards + veteran master at arms.

definitions.name: [Manor] Noble Retinue (per 20 soldiers block)
definitions.description: 100 gp per 20 soldiers + 30 gp per 10 soldiers/tenday (max 70); 12 days; Prereq Barracks, Noble Staff.

definitions.name: [Manor] Basic Manor Insurance
definitions.description: 10 gp/tenday, 1 day. Fire/storm/flood/subsidence.

definitions.name: [Manor] Enhanced Manor Insurance
definitions.description: 20 gp/tenday, 1 day. Prereq: Basic Manor Insurance. Hostile physical/magical damage.

definitions.name: [Manor] Local Informants
definitions.description: 15 gp/tenday, 3 days. Prereq: Basic Manor Staff. Defenders not surprised; neighbourhood intel.

definitions.name: [Manor] Information Connection (each org)
definitions.description: 20 gp/tenday, 7 days. Prereq: Local Informants, Basic Tavern Staff. Advantage on deals/recall with chosen guild/faction.

definitions.name: [Manor] Spy Network (each org)
definitions.description: 40 gp/tenday, 30 days. Prereq: Information Connection, Snug. 1 question + 1 order per tenday.

definitions.name: [Manor] Garden (each roof side, max 2)
definitions.description: 300 gp, 12 days. Prereq: Basic Manor Staff. Inspiration once; herbs; uses roof space.

definitions.name: [Manor] Shrine
definitions.description: 1,000 gp, 7 days. Prereq: Basic Manor Staff. Divine prep slot bonus; Religion advantage.

definitions.name: [Manor] Library
definitions.description: 1,000 gp, 7 days. Prereq: Basic Manor Staff. Arcane prep slot bonus; Int checks except Religion.

definitions.name: [Manor] Clinic
definitions.description: 200 gp + 10 gp/tenday, 6 days. Prereq: Basic Manor Staff. Medicine advantage on LR; death save feature after 7 LRs.

definitions.name: [Manor] Laboratory
definitions.description: 300 gp + 25 gp/tenday, 9 days. Prereq: Basic Staff, Vault. Random potion/tenday; request common potion.

definitions.name: [Manor] Smithy
definitions.description: 400 gp + 25 gp/tenday, 8 days. Prereq: Basic Staff, Vault. Random metal gear/tenday; maintenance reduction.

definitions.name: [Manor] House Finance Office
definitions.description: 150 gp + 15 gp/tenday, 8 days. Prereq: Service Staff, Vault. Reduces guild fees / loss risk (narrative).

definitions.name: [Manor] Training Course
definitions.description: 150 gp, 4 days. Speed +5 or +1 init for a month after training tendays.

definitions.name: [Manor] Cobbled Street
definitions.description: 200 gp, 15 days. Half travel time around manor; +1 business roll if Basic Tavern Staff; Persuasion advantage vs neighbours.

definitions.name: [Manor] Custom: Cartography Studio
definitions.description: 200 gp, 5 days. Cartographer advantage after 7 LRs; Work downtime profit doubled with tools.

definitions.name: [Manor] Custom Manor Renovation
definitions.description: Cost TBD. Discuss with DM.

definitions.name: [Tavern] Basic Tavern Staff
definitions.description: 10 gp/tenday, 2 days. Required to operate tavern.

definitions.name: [Tavern] Tavern Service Staff
definitions.description: 15 gp/tenday, 4 days. Prereq: Basic Staff, Taproom Mod, Kitchen Mod. Valuation +1; required for Quality Taproom.

definitions.name: [Tavern] Tavern Bouncers
definitions.description: 10 gp/tenday, 6 days. Prereq: Basic Staff, Taproom Cheap. Violence/crime risk; 2 bandits; synergy Barracks/Noble Retinue per doc.

definitions.name: [Tavern] Tavern Preventative Maintenance
definitions.description: 10 gp/tenday. May reduce future expenses.

definitions.name: [Tavern] Basic Tavern Insurance
definitions.description: 10 gp/tenday, 1 day. Natural disasters. Halved if Basic Manor Insurance.

definitions.name: [Tavern] Enhanced Tavern Insurance
definitions.description: 20 gp/tenday, 1 day. Prereq: Basic Tavern Insurance. Hostile damage. Halved if Enhanced Manor Insurance.

definitions.name: [Tavern] Membership — Fellowship of Innkeepers
definitions.description: 2 gp/tenday (duplicate of manor line if not combined — archive one if using single entry).

definitions.name: [Tavern] Guild Contract Fees (tavern op)
definitions.description: 5 gp/tenday if tracked separately from manor.

definitions.name: [Tavern] City Services (tavern)
definitions.description: 5 gp/tenday if tracked separately from manor.

definitions.name: [Tavern] Taproom (Cheap)
definitions.description: 200 gp, 12 days. Valuation +1. Minimum cheap to operate.

definitions.name: [Tavern] Taproom (Moderate)
definitions.description: 500 gp, 12 days. Valuation +3. Minimum cheap to operate.

definitions.name: [Tavern] Taproom (Quality)
definitions.description: 1000 gp, 12 days. Valuation +5. Minimum cheap to operate.

definitions.name: [Tavern] Kitchen (Cheap)
definitions.description: 200 gp, 7 days. Valuation +1. Enables Hold Feast.

definitions.name: [Tavern] Kitchen (Moderate)
definitions.description: 500 gp, 7 days. Valuation +3. Enables Hold Feast.

definitions.name: [Tavern] Kitchen (Quality)
definitions.description: 1000 gp, 7 days. Valuation +5. Enables Hold Feast.

definitions.name: [Tavern] Larder (Cheap)
definitions.description: 200 gp, 3 days. Prereq Kitchen Cheap. Valuation +1.

definitions.name: [Tavern] Larder (Moderate)
definitions.description: 500 gp, 3 days. Prereq Kitchen Cheap. Valuation +3.

definitions.name: [Tavern] Larder (Quality)
definitions.description: 1000 gp, 3 days. Prereq Kitchen Cheap. Valuation +5.

definitions.name: [Tavern] Cellar (Cheap)
definitions.description: 400 gp, 5 days. Valuation +1. Smuggling downtime.

definitions.name: [Tavern] Cellar (Moderate)
definitions.description: 650 gp, 5 days. Valuation +3. Smuggling downtime.

definitions.name: [Tavern] Cellar (Quality)
definitions.description: 800 gp, 5 days. Valuation +5. Smuggling downtime.

definitions.name: [Tavern] Privy (Cheap)
definitions.description: 200 gp, 6 days. Prereq Taproom Cheap. Valuation +2.

definitions.name: [Tavern] Privy (Moderate)
definitions.description: 500 gp, 6 days. Prereq Taproom Cheap. Valuation +3.

definitions.name: [Tavern] Privy (Quality)
definitions.description: 1000 gp, 6 days. Prereq Taproom Cheap. Valuation +4.

definitions.name: [Tavern] Brewery — Cheap
definitions.description: 200 gp, 5 days. Prereq Cellar Cheap. Valuation +1; half cellar; Brewing downtime.

definitions.name: [Tavern] Brewery — Moderate
definitions.description: 450 gp, 5 days. Valuation +3.

definitions.name: [Tavern] Brewery — Quality
definitions.description: 600 gp, 5 days. Valuation +5.

definitions.name: [Tavern] Distillery — Cheap
definitions.description: 400 gp, 5 days. Prereq Cellar Cheap. Valuation +1.

definitions.name: [Tavern] Distillery — Moderate
definitions.description: 650 gp, 5 days. Valuation +3.

definitions.name: [Tavern] Distillery — Quality
definitions.description: 800 gp, 5 days. Valuation +5.

definitions.name: [Tavern] Winery — Cheap
definitions.description: 500 gp, 7 days. Prereq Cellar Moderate. Valuation +2; vineyard; half cellar.

definitions.name: [Tavern] Winery — Moderate
definitions.description: 750 gp, 7 days. Valuation +4.

definitions.name: [Tavern] Winery — Quality
definitions.description: 1,200 gp, 7 days. Valuation +6.

definitions.name: [Tavern] Steam-Powered Tap
definitions.description: 650 gp, 10 days. Prereq Cellar w/ beer space. Valuation +4. Beer Festival downtime.

definitions.name: [Tavern] Beer Garden
definitions.description: 200 gp, 3 days. Prereq Taproom Cheap. Valuation +2. Outdoor BBQ; not winter.

definitions.name: [Tavern] Stage (per taproom/saloon/beer garden)
definitions.description: 200 gp, 3 days. Prereq Taproom Cheap, Service Staff. Valuation +1. Perform downtime.

definitions.name: [Tavern] Dance Floor (per indoor stage)
definitions.description: 300 gp, 4 days. Prereq Entertainment, Stage. Valuation +1. Dance Night downtime.

definitions.name: [Tavern] Snug
definitions.description: 400 gp, 6 days. Prereq Taproom Cheap. Valuation +1. Spying downtime.

definitions.name: [Tavern] Tavern Entertainment (per stage)
definitions.description: 15 gp/tenday, 6 days. Prereq Basic Staff, Taproom Cheap, Stage. Valuation +1; d6 odd +1 / even +3 to business table (DM).

definitions.name: [Tavern] Saloon Bar — Cheap
definitions.description: 500 gp, 12 days. Prereq Taproom Cheap, Kitchen Cheap, Snug, Entertainment. Valuation +2. Carousing advantage.

definitions.name: [Tavern] Saloon Bar — Moderate
definitions.description: 700 gp, 12 days. Valuation +4.

definitions.name: [Tavern] Saloon Bar — Quality
definitions.description: 1,200 gp, 12 days. Valuation +6.

definitions.name: [Tavern] Feasting Hall — Cheap
definitions.description: 500 gp, 8 days. Prereq Service Staff, Kitchen Mod, Larder Mod. Valuation +2. Banquet downtime.

definitions.name: [Tavern] Feasting Hall — Moderate
definitions.description: 750 gp, 8 days. Valuation +4.

definitions.name: [Tavern] Feasting Hall — Quality
definitions.description: 1,200 gp, 8 days. Valuation +6.

definitions.name: [Tavern] Business Office
definitions.description: 200 gp, 6 days. Prereq Taproom Cheap, Basic Staff. Valuation +1. Marketing downtime.

definitions.name: [Tavern] Splendorous Window
definitions.description: Special: valuation +1 (stack with DM approval).

definitions.name: [Tavern] Guest Rooms (1 room)
definitions.description: 400 gp, 10 days. Valuation +1. Recruit hirelings downtime. Prereq per doc.

definitions.name: [Tavern] Guest Rooms (2 rooms)
definitions.description: 650 gp, 10 days. Valuation +3. Recruit hirelings downtime. Prereq per doc.

definitions.name: [Tavern] Guest Rooms (3 rooms)
definitions.description: 900 gp, 10 days. Valuation +5. Recruit hirelings downtime. Prereq per doc.

definitions.name: [Tavern] Guest Rooms (4 rooms)
definitions.description: 1150 gp, 10 days. Valuation +7. Recruit hirelings downtime. Prereq per doc.

definitions.name: [Tavern] Guest Rooms (5 rooms)
definitions.description: 1400 gp, 10 days. Valuation +9. Recruit hirelings downtime. Prereq per doc.

definitions.name: [Tavern] Guest Rooms (6 rooms)
definitions.description: 1650 gp, 10 days. Valuation +11. Recruit hirelings downtime. Prereq per doc.

definitions.name: [Tavern] Stable — Cheap
definitions.description: 400 gp, 20 days. Prereq Guest 1+. Valuation +2.

definitions.name: [Tavern] Stable — Moderate
definitions.description: 650 gp, 20 days. Valuation +4.

definitions.name: [Tavern] Stable — Quality
definitions.description: 800 gp, 20 days. Valuation +6.

definitions.name: [Tavern] Coach House — Cheap
definitions.description: 400 gp, 20 days. Prereq Guest 4+, Stable Quality. Valuation +1. Noble connection downtime.

definitions.name: [Tavern] Coach House — Moderate
definitions.description: 650 gp, 20 days. Valuation +3.

definitions.name: [Tavern] Coach House — Quality
definitions.description: 800 gp, 20 days. Valuation +5.
